meaning: n.难题,谜v.(使)迷惑,(使)为难,迷惑不解
examples: We fitted together the pieces of the puzzle.
We invited readers who completed the puzzle to send in their solutions.
The rise in accidents remains a puzzle.
Piecing together the puzzle of Cambodia was a way to piece together the puzzle of me.
It's like a jigsaw puzzle: you keep on looking until you've found the right piece.
